tasks.subject: Task 1: Add .github/dependabot.yml
tasks.description:
Dependabot v2 config: grouped weekly PRs for gomod /backend, npm /mobile, github-actions /; npm ignores major bumps for the 8 Expo-SDK-54 packages; header comment on the Expo-pin rationale.

```json:metadata
{"files": [".github/dependabot.yml"], "verifyCommand": "python3 -c \"import yaml; d=yaml.safe_load(open('.github/dependabot.yml')); assert d['version']==2; npm=[u for u in d['updates'] if u['package-ecosystem']=='npm'][0]; assert len(npm['ignore'])==8; print('ok')\"", "spec": "docs/superpowers/specs/2026-06-01-dependabot-design.md"}
```
